name: rp2040_s3jtag_stage2
description: Rule-B Stage 2 for RP2040 via S3JTAG: all currently validated tests that require manual wiring, including TARGETIN signal checks and UART integration over the ESP32-S3 internal Web UART bridge.
notes: Pack-level board is intentionally omitted because the TARGETIN tests use rp2040_pico_s3jtag while the UART test uses rp2040_pico_s3jtag_uart.
